articles.title: HWMonitor and CPU-Z download links were infected with malware for 6 hours before devs caught it
articles.description: The devs were quick to remove the malware, as millions of users rely on these to track temperatures, voltages, fan speeds, and other system parameters.Continue reading at TweakTown
